title: From Primary Melanoma to Metastatic Evolution: AI-Powered Pathology Integrated with Functional Analysis and Clinical Metadata Improving Treatment Prediction.
snippet: A critical gap in current efficiency in melanoma patient treatment is the lack of a fully integrated, functional understanding of tumor evolution over time. Recent advances have fundamentally reshaped our understanding of melanoma biology, while increasing clinical complexity has highlighted the need for more comprehensive and biologically informed clinical...
